text:
"Heart Of Steel" (Hagane no Kokoro) is the ending to the Fullmetal Alchemist 2003 OVA Collection. It features CGI Animated Armors from the Conqueror Of Shamballa film. It features Behind the Scenes sections from filming the other OVAs such as the filming of the Live-Action OVA with Alphonse at Studio Bones.

Trivia

The Singers of the song are the Japanese Actors of Edward, Alphonse, and Winry.

Edward: Romi Park

Alphonse: Rie Kugimiya

Winry: Megumi Toyoguchi (2003 Anime Voice Actress only)
